description_long: This mosque is a grand, symmetrical structure with a large central onion-shaped dome flanked by four tall minarets at each corner. The main building features ornate arched entrances and windows, with intricate relief details visible on the dome and facade. The mosque sits on a raised platform with a broad staircase leading to the main entrance, and is surrounded by a manicured garden with pathways. The minarets are slender and capped with small domes, echoing the central dome's design. The exterior appears predominantly white, suggesting marble or similar stone, and the overall form is highly reminiscent of Mughal architecture, particularly the Taj Mahal. Decorative elements include geometric patterns and possibly floral motifs, but no visible Arabic calligraphy.
description: A grand white mosque with a large central dome, four corner minarets, and ornate arched entrances, set on a raised platform with surrounding gardens. The design is highly detailed and symmetrical, evoking classic Mughal architecture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central dome, and two minarets with a clear view of the garden pathway leading up to the mosque.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mosque's depth, the side arches, and the alignment of the minarets, with the garden extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, central dome, and all four minarets, with less emphasis on the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mosque's right side, minarets, and the garden extending to the right.
attribute_dome: One large central onion-shaped dome, prominently placed at the center of the mosque, with detailed surface relief and a finial at the top.
attribute_minaret: Four tall, slender minarets, one at each corner of the mosque, each capped with a small dome and finial, rising slightly above the main dome's base.
attribute_islamic_geometric_patterns: Geometric patterns are visible as relief details on the dome and around the arched entrances, likely star and tessellation motifs, all in white.
attribute_architectural_style: Mughal, specifically modeled after the Taj Mahal, with features such as a large central dome, four minarets, arched entrances, and intricate relief ornamentation.
